fact_relationship.csv.__table__: Relationships between facts in different domains

death.csv.__table__: Death records with cause and type details

care_site.csv.__table__: Care site information with service and location details

imaging_studies.csv.__table__: Imaging studies with patient and encounter details

location.csv.__table__: Location details including address, city, state, zip, county, and source value

observation.csv.__table__: Clinical observations and measurements for patients

procedures.csv.__table__: Medical procedures with associated costs and reasons

medications.csv.__table__: Medication records with associated costs and reasons

visit_occurrence.csv.__table__: Visit occurrences with detailed information including dates, types, and related entities

provider.csv.__table__: Provider information including ID, name, NPI, DEA, specialty, care site, birth year, gender, and source values
